content.en:
The Void Will Realm.

As soon as Ye Tian came in, he felt an unimaginable suppression.

This oppression is not directed against the body, but against the will, like compressing a sea into a drop of water, and the same effect is the effect here, constantly suppressing his will.

Of course, in the process of suppression, a wonderful energy is integrated into the will, ensuring that the will will will not crumble.

Otherwise, if the suppression is not restored, the will will will not be able to withstand it, and it will directly crumble.

"What a wonderful place, if you stay here for ten billion eternal years, your will can be compressed many times and become extremely strong!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Therefore, when you enter the realm of the Void Will, there is no such thing as no gain, and even if you really can't condense the Wisdom of the Will, it is one of the benefits for the will to become strong.

The Void Will Realm is not big, it is an ancient city.

It's not that the Extreme Realm Perfect Masters don't want to open up a larger Void Will Realm, but they can't do it, and being able to open up such a large Void Will Realm is already the limit.

Moreover, the Void Will Realm cannot withstand too many living beings.

Because of this, it is very difficult to enter the Void Will Realm, unless there is a big background, such as the descendants of those Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers who opened up the Void Will Realm, or they have great merit and great contributions.

For example, Ye Tian ranked first on the killing list in the Extreme Dao Genius Battle, and killed a large number of Extreme Dao creatures in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, which made a huge contribution to the end of the realm, so he entered the Void Will Realm with no background.

Otherwise, how could he be qualified to enter the Void Will Realm now, at least he would have to wait until the Perfect Controller of the Void Realm or the Perfect Controller of the True Realm before he could hope to enter here.

Ye Tian is located in an ancient temple in the city at this moment, and this temple is the entrance to the outside world.

Then he walked out of the ancient temple and into the streets.

There aren't many people in this city, and it seems a little lonely.

After all, the Void Will Realm can't carry a lot of people, so there are only about 10,000 strong people cultivating here.

There are many palaces in the Void Will Realm, all of which are ownerless, and every cultivator can practice in these palaces.

In addition, there are many will towers here, and each of them carries some illusory will treasure.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to a tower of will and walked in.

Rumble!!!!

An illusory will pagoda appeared in front of Ye Tian, this is a six-story will pagoda, such a will treasure is not bad.

After all, every layer of the Pagoda of Will is very difficult to condense.

"This is the Wonder of the Will!"

Ye Tian began to comprehend.

Although it is only a phantom, there is still the mystery of the Pagoda of Will.

Moreover, this Pagoda of Will Phantom will be consumed, and if there are more enlightened people, it will gradually dissipate, and it can only be maintained forever unless its owner replenishes the power of will.

If it is really about to dissipate, that strong man can come over and replenish his will power without delaying time.

Time passed slowly, and after Ye Tian comprehended this Will Pagoda, he continued to look for other Will Pagodas.

After a long time, Ye Tian comprehended a lot of Will Pagoda, and coupled with his understanding, he roughly understood the structure of the Will Pagoda.

Although each will pagoda is different, there are similarities.

But Ye Tian knows very well that he has no way to condense the Will Pagoda now, not that he can't, but that the strength of the will is not enough, if he wants to condense the Will Pagoda, he must condense the will to a very tenacious degree, otherwise he will not be able to form the Will Pagoda.

If you slowly condense your will in the outside world, the speed will be very slow and slow, but if you are in the Void Will Realm, even if you are lying down, your will will quickly condense and become stronger and stronger, so as to meet the needs of condensing the Will Pagoda.

Of course, Ye Tian could also condense other shapes of Will Treasures, but the Will Pagoda was undoubtedly the most suitable one, after all, it had been tested by countless powerhouses.

Therefore, Ye Tian will also choose to condense the Will Pagoda.

"According to my understanding, at least spend hundreds of millions of eternal years in the Void Will Realm before you can condense the Extreme Dao Will to the extent that you can try to condense the Will Pagoda. Ye Tian said darkly.

Therefore, he is now slowly comprehending the illusory image of the Will Pagoda, and he is not in a hurry to condense the Will Pagoda.

......

As the years passed, Ye Tian's Extreme Dao of Light gradually ascended to the Dacheng realm, and he was still progressing towards the consummation realm.

Due to the use of the Extreme Mangbai Grass again and again, coupled with his deep understanding of the Extreme Path of Light, Ye Tian gradually created an Extreme Path Secret Technique, which allowed him to touch the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass without being killed by the trace of the Extreme Light Extreme Path contained in the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass.

Ye Tian named this secret technique the Touching Secret Technique, and with the Touching Secret Technique, it would be easier for Ye Tian to comprehend the Extreme Light Extreme Dao contained in the Extreme Mangbai Grass.

Before you know it, 600 million eternal years have passed.

For the other super-perfect masters, 600 million eternal years was not a long time, and there was not even the slightest progress.

But for Ye Tian, in these 600 million eternal years, his progress was too great.

"Thirty-six Extreme Dao chains, all broken!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Thirty-six Extreme Dao chains, all of them are broken, maybe no one in the end of the world can do it, and even in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, there are very few Extreme Dao creatures who can do this, because there are too many treasures such as the Extreme Dao Golden Fruit needed to break the thirty-six Extreme Dao chains.

In addition to breaking the thirty-six Extreme Dao chains, Ye Tian also cultivated the Extreme Dao of Light to the consummation realm.

However, it was too difficult to raise the Extreme Dao of Light to the limit.

He didn't have the real Extreme Miscanthus White Grass, and he couldn't swallow and refine the Extreme Miscanthus White Grass, and just by forcibly comprehending it, the effect was naturally very poor.

Moreover, even if there was a real Extreme Miscanthus White Grass, there was almost no hope of comprehending the Extreme Dao of Light at the extreme level.

Even for those who are in perfect control of the Extreme Realm, it is unimaginably difficult to comprehend the Extreme Extreme Dao, and Ye Tian naturally does not expect that he can do it at the moment.

Anyway, he was already very satisfied with being able to comprehend the Extreme Dao of Light to the realm of perfection.

In addition, he has also comprehended the Spatial Extreme Dao, the Sword Extreme Dao, and the Defense Extreme Dao to the peak realm of Dacheng, and he is not far from the consummation realm, but it is not easy to break this shackle.

After these Extreme Dao progressions, Ye Tian's Endless Extreme Dao was naturally also promoted to the Xiaocheng realm.

The Endless Extreme Dao is small, and all the thirty-six Extreme Dao chains have been reached, and the cultivation has reached the ultimate of the super-perfect controller.

It can be said that Ye Tian can already attack the perfect controller of the Void Realm, and he is still breaking through in the most perfect state.

However, Ye Tian was still ready to wait for himself to condense the Will Pagoda before breaking through, maybe there would be more benefits.

"The will is almost compressed, and I am already qualified to condense the will pagoda, I hope it can be a one-time success!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, he also knew that one-time success was almost unrealistic, which strong person who condensed the Pagoda of Will, hadn't he tried countless times?

In short, it is enough to be able to successfully condense.
